Create CRM web application structure
May 31 · Skladchi0 · main ·
+891-4
Shu botim asosida Web site qilmoqchiman. CRM tizimiga o'xshash bo'ladi: Admin panel va user panel bo'ladi. telegram bot orqali user qabul qilinsa login joyiga user_id va bot taqdim etgan kod beradi. Bularni bot orqali keyin sozlaymiz. Hozir Botdagi tugmalar to'liq aks etsin, admin panelda chap tarafda menyu va shu tugmalar qator turadi. Asosiy, Mahsulotlar(filial ham shu bo'lim ichida), Boshqarish, Hisobot(kunlik, oylik, umumiy), Sklad(bu real skladda bor mahsulotlar miqdori) Buyerda mahsulotga buyurtmani mijoz beradi, va nima kerakligini aytadi. Xabarni Admin tasdiqlasa buyurtma xodim toifasiga ko'rinadi. Va buyurtmani o'z sahifasidan xodim jarayonda deb birin ketin bajarib ketaveradi. Bu protsess Adminga ko'rinadi, tugatdim deb keyingisiga o'tiladi. Bot orqali start berilganda Admin toifa tanlaydi. Xodim, Mijoz shunga ko'ra panel ochiladi login qilinganda. Login qilishda username yoki user_id dan biri kiritish kerak. parol esa bot orqali qo'yilgan bo'ladi. Bular Mongodb bazasida saqlanadi. bot va site buyerda bitta bazada bo'ladi. Faqat rasmlar boshqa storage xizmatida saqlanadi. Men domain ni hozircha olmayman, hozircha bepul MVP darajada ishlataman, shularni hisobga ol, yana takliflar bo'lsa bemalol berib loyihani mukammal qilib qursak bo'ladi. Menga noldan tushuntirib qaysi kodni qayerga yuklash alohida repo ochish kerakmi, har birini izohda tushuntirib ketsangiz, web bo'yicha tajribam yo'q, shunga yordam bering. Kodlarni oson va tartibli yozing, iloji boricha papka va filelarga e'tibor bering. Bu men bergan taxminiy yo'nalish, sen nima taklif qila olasan, pyton, html, js... DB: MongoDB Atlas Storage: Firebase console (photos) Backend: Flask Hosting: Render

Summary

  • Flask bot app ichiga CRM web panel routelarini uladim: / endi /dashboard ga yo‘naltiradi va register_web_routes(app) orqali web panel bot bilan bitta Flask app ichida ishlaydi. Commit: ed1360f Add Flask CRM web panel MVP.

  • Login, sessiya, rol nazorati va asosiy dashboard qo‘shildi: admin WEB_ADMIN_PASSWORD bilan, oddiy user esa username yoki user_id + saqlangan parol bilan kiradi; dashboard rolga qarab buyurtma va sklad ko‘rinishini chiqaradi.

  • Admin/xodim uchun “Mahsulotlar” bo‘limi qo‘shildi: sklad, filial, mahsulot turi va mahsulot qo‘shish web orqali bajariladi.

  • Buyurtma jarayoni qo‘shildi: mijoz buyurtma yuboradi, admin tasdiqlaydi yoki rad etadi, xodim “jarayonda” va “tugatdim” statuslari bilan bajaradi.

  • “Boshqarish” bo‘limida foydalanuvchi rolini (customer, employee, admin), tasdiq holatini va web parolini berish imkoniyati qo‘shildi.

  • MongoDB manager web CRM uchun kengaytirildi: orders kolleksiyasi va indekslari, user web access/parol helperlari, sklad bo‘yicha qoldiq va buyurtma status helperlari qo‘shildi.

  • Chap menyuli admin/user panel layouti, responsive CSS, badge/status dizayni va bot tugmalariga mos menyu tartibi qo‘shildi.

  • Render deploy, MongoDB Atlas, Firebase Storage keyingi bosqichi, alohida repo kerak emasligi va MVP keyingi takliflari bo‘yicha alohida tushuntirish fayli qo‘shildi.

  • .gitignore qo‘shildi, Python cache va lokal environment fayllari repo ichiga tushmasligi uchun.

Testing

  • ✅ python -m compileall main.py database web

  • ✅ python - <<'PY' ... PY — fake DB bilan Flask smoke test: /login va /dashboard 200 status qaytardi.

PR yaratildi: Add Flask CRM web panel MVP.

README_WEB_MVP.mdREADME_WEB_MVP.mdREADME_WEB_MVP.md
New
+67-0
line numberline content
1
+# Sklad CRM Web MVP
2
+
3
+Bu loyiha mavjud Telegram bot bazasiga Flask web panel qo'shadi. Hozircha alohida repo shart emas: bot va sayt bir Flask app ichida bitta Render service sifatida ishlaydi. Web kodlari `web/routes.py`, `templates/` va `static/` ichida tartiblangan. Bot va sayt bitta MongoDB Atlas bazasidan foydalanadi; rasm fayllarini keyingi bosqichda Firebase Storage ga ulash tavsiya qilinadi.
4
+
5
+## Arxitektura
6
+
7
+- **Backend:** Python + Flask (`main.py`, `web/routes.py`)
8
+- **Frontend:** HTML/Jinja templates + CSS + oddiy JS (`templates/`, `static/`)
9
+- **DB:** MongoDB Atlas (`database/mongodb.py`)
10
+- **Bot:** pyTelegramBotAPI (`main.py`)
11
+- **Hosting:** Render free web service
12
+- **Storage:** MVPda botdagi Telegram `file_id`; keyingi bosqichda Firebase Storage URL saqlanadi.
13
+
14
+## Web panel bo'limlari
15
+
16
+1. **Asosiy** — buyurtmalar va sklad qoldiqlari qisqa statistikasi.
17
+2. **Mahsulotlar** — sklad, filial, mahsulot turi va mahsulot qo'shish.
18
+3. **Boshqarish** — user roli (`admin`, `employee`, `customer`), tasdiq va web parol berish.
19
+4. **Hisobot** — umumiy buyurtma statuslari; keyingi bosqichda kunlik/oylik filter qo'shiladi.
20
+5. **Sklad** — real qoldiq miqdorlari.
21
+6. **Buyurtmalar** — mijoz so'rov yuboradi, admin tasdiqlaydi, xodim jarayonga olib tugatadi.
22
+
23
+## Login mantiqi
24
+
25
+- Admin MVP login:
26
+ - login: `admin` yoki `ADMIN_ID`
27
+ - parol: `WEB_ADMIN_PASSWORD` environment qiymati
28
+- Oddiy foydalanuvchi:
29
+ - login: Telegram `username` yoki `user_id`
30
+ - parol: admin web paneldagi **Boshqarish** bo'limida vaqtincha beradi
31
+ - keyingi bosqichda bu parol bot orqali avtomatik beriladi
32
+
33
+> Muhim: Render envda `WEB_ADMIN_PASSWORD` ni albatta kuchli parolga almashtiring. Kodda default `admin123` faqat lokal MVP uchun qoldirilgan.
34
+
35
+## Render ga yuklash
36
+
37
+1. GitHub da bitta repo yetarli: bot va web panel bir Flask app ichida yuradi.
38
+2. Render → **New Web Service** → GitHub repo ni tanlang.
39
+3. Build command:
40
+ ```bash
41
+ pip install -r requirements.txt
42
+ ```
43
+4. Start command:
44
+ ```bash
45
+ gunicorn main:app
46
+ ```
47
+5. Environment variables:
48
+ ```env
49
+ BOT_TOKEN=telegram_bot_token
50
+ ADMIN_ID=telegram_admin_user_id
51
+ MONGO_URI=mongodb+srv://...
52
+ WEB_ADMIN_PASSWORD=kuchli_admin_parol
53
+ SECRET_KEY=random_uzun_secret
54
+ ```
55
+6. Deploy bo'lgach sayt:
56
+ - `/login` — web login
57
+ - `/dashboard` — CRM panel
58
+ - `/<BOT_TOKEN>` — Telegram webhook endpoint
59
+
60
+## Keyingi mukammallashtirish takliflari
61
+
62
+- Bot orqali `/setpassword` va `/role` komandalari bilan web parol/rol berish.
63
+- Firebase Admin SDK bilan rasm upload va MongoDB da `image_url` saqlash.
64
+- Buyurtmaga mahsulot variantlarini strukturali qo'shish: mahsulot ID, miqdor, birlik.
65
+- Sklad kirim-chiqim audit jurnali va Excel/PDF eksport.
66
+- Kunlik/oylik hisobot uchun date range filter.
67
+- Render free sleep muammosini kamaytirish uchun health check yoki keyin pullik instansiya.

+ # ==================== WEB ORDERS / CRM ====================
542
+
543
+ def create_order(self, customer_id, customer_name, title, description, warehouse=None, branch=None):
544
+ doc = {
545
+ "customer_id": customer_id,
546
+ "customer_name": customer_name,
547
+ "title": title,
548
+ "description": description,
549
+ "warehouse": warehouse,
550
+ "branch": branch,
551
+ "status": "new",
552
+ "assigned_to": None,
553
+ "events": [
554
+ {"status": "new", "text": "Buyurtma mijoz tomonidan yuborildi", "at": datetime.utcnow()}
555
+ ],
556
+ "created_at": datetime.utcnow(),
557
+ "updated_at": datetime.utcnow(),
558
+ }
559
+ result = self.db["orders"].insert_one(doc)
560
+ return str(result.inserted_id)
561
+
562
+ def get_orders(self, status=None, customer_id=None, employee_view=False, limit=100):
563
+ query = {}
564
+ if status:
565
+ query["status"] = status
566
+ if customer_id:
567
+ query["customer_id"] = customer_id
568
+ if employee_view:
569
+ query["status"] = {"$in": ["approved", "in_progress"]}
570
+ return list(self.db["orders"].find(query).sort("created_at", -1).limit(limit))
571
+
572
+ def get_order(self, order_id):
573
+ try:
574
+ return self.db["orders"].find_one({"_id": ObjectId(order_id)})
575
+ except Exception:
576
+ return None
577
+
578
+ def update_order_status(self, order_id, status, actor_name, note=None, assigned_to=None):
579
+ event_text = note or status
580
+ update = {
581
+ "$set": {"status": status, "updated_at": datetime.utcnow()},
582
+ "$push": {"events": {"status": status, "text": event_text, "actor": actor_name, "at": datetime.utcnow()}},
583
+ }
584
+ if assigned_to is not None:
585
+ update["$set"]["assigned_to"] = assigned_to
586
+ try:
587
+ result = self.db["orders"].update_one({"_id": ObjectId(order_id)}, update)
588
+ return result.modified_count > 0
589
+ except Exception:
590
+ return False
591
+
592
+ def get_order_stats(self):
593
+ statuses = ["new", "approved", "in_progress", "done", "rejected"]
594
+ stats = {key: self.db["orders"].count_documents({"status": key}) for key in statuses}
595
+ stats["total"] = self.db["orders"].count_documents({})
596
+ return stats
597

32
+.sidebar a { color: #e5e7eb; text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; }
33
+.sidebar a:hover { background: #374151; }
34
+.hint { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 24px; line-height: 1.5; }
35
+.content { flex: 1; padding: 28px; min-width: 0; }
36
+.content.auth { display: grid; place-items: center; }
37
+.top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; }
38
+.top h1 { margin: 0 0 6px; }
39
+.top p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted); }
40
+.panel,
41
+.card,
42
+.login-card {
43
+ background: var(--panel);
44
+ border: 1px solid var(--line);
45
+ border-radius: 20px;
46
+ box-shadow: 0 10px 30px #1118270d;
47
+}
48
+.panel { padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
49
+.cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
50
+.card { padding: 20px; }
51
+.card b { font-size: 34px; display: block; }
52
+.card span,
53
+.panel small { color: var(--muted); }
54
+.grid { display: grid; gap: 18px; }
55
+.grid.two { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
56
+.grid.four { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
57
+.stack { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
58
+input,
59
+select,
60
+textarea { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px 12px; background: #fff; font: inherit; }
61
+textarea { min-height: 110px; }
62
+button { border: 0; background: var(--primary); color: #fff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
63
+button.ghost { background: #e5e7eb; color: #111827; }
64
+.inline { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
65
+.login-card { width: min(440px, 92vw); padding: 34px; }
66
+.login-card .logo { font-size: 46px; }
67
+.login-card h1 { margin-bottom: 6px; }
68
+.login-card p { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }
69
+.flash-wrap { margin-bottom: 16px; }
70
+.flash { padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
71
+.flash.success { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; }
72
+.flash.error { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
73
+.table-wrap { overflow: auto; }
74
+table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
75
+th,
76
+td { text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); padding: 12px; vertical-align: top; }
77
+td small { display: block; margin-top: 5px; }
78
+.badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 9px; font-size: 12px; background: #e5e7eb; }
79
+.badge.new { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }
80
+.badge.approved { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
81
+.badge.in_progress { background: #ede9fe; color: #6d28d9; }
82
+.badge.done { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; }
83
+.badge.rejected { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
84
+.chips { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
85
+.chips span { background: #f3f4f6; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 999px; padding: 9px 12px; }
86
+.forms .panel { margin: 0; }
87
+.filters { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; }
88
+.order-form { max-width: 720px; }
89
+
90
+@media (max-width: 1050px) {
91
+ .cards,
92
+ .grid.two,
93
+ .grid.four { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
94
+ .sidebar { position: fixed; z-index: 2; transform: translateX(-100%); }
95
+ .content { padding: 18px; }
96
+}

+from datetime import datetime
2
+import os
3
+
4
+from flask import flash, redirect, render_template, request, session, url_for
5
+from werkzeug.security import check_password_hash, generate_password_hash
6
+
7
+from config.settings import ADMIN_ID
8
+from database.mongodb import get_db
9
+
10
+ADMIN_PASSWORD = os.getenv("WEB_ADMIN_PASSWORD", "admin123")
11
+
12
+
13
+def _display_name(user):
14
+ if not user:
15
+ return "Mehmon"
16
+ username = user.get("username")
17
+ if username and username != "NoUsername":
18
+ return f"@{username}"
19
+ return user.get("first_name") or str(user.get("user_id"))
20
+
21
+
22
+def _current_user():
23
+ user_id = session.get("user_id")
24
+ if not user_id:
25
+ return None
26
+ if session.get("role") == "admin" and user_id == ADMIN_ID:
27
+ return {"user_id": ADMIN_ID, "username": "admin", "first_name": "Admin", "role": "admin", "approved": True}
28
+ return get_db().get_user(int(user_id))
29
+
30
+
31
+def _role(user):
32
+ if not user:
33
+ return None
34
+ if int(user.get("user_id", 0)) == ADMIN_ID:
35
+ return "admin"
36
+ return user.get("role") or "customer"
37
+
38
+
39
+def _login_required(roles=None):
40
+ user = _current_user()
41
+ if not user:
42
+ return None, redirect(url_for("web_login"))
43
+ role = _role(user)
44
+ if roles and role not in roles:
45
+ flash("Bu sahifaga kirish huquqingiz yo'q.", "error")
46
+ return None, redirect(url_for("web_dashboard"))
47
+ return user, None
48
+
49
+
50
+def _base_context(user=None):
51
+ db = get_db()
52
+ user = user or _current_user()
53
+ warehouses = db.get_all_warehouses()
54
+ selected_warehouse = request.args.get("warehouse") or (warehouses[0]["name"] if warehouses else None)
55
+ return {
56
+ "user": user,
57
+ "role": _role(user),
58
+ "display_name": _display_name(user),
59
+ "warehouses": warehouses,
60
+ "selected_warehouse": selected_warehouse,
61
+ "year": datetime.utcnow().year,
62
+ }
63
+
64
+
65
+def register_web_routes(app):
66
+ app.secret_key = os.getenv("SECRET_KEY", os.getenv("FLASK_SECRET_KEY", "dev-secret-change-me"))
67
+
68
+ @app.get("/login")
69
+ def web_login():
70
+ return render_template("login.html", **_base_context())
71
+
72
+ @app.post("/login")
73
+ def web_login_post():
74
+ login = request.form.get("login", "").strip()
75
+ password = request.form.get("password", "")
76
+ if not login or not password:
77
+ flash("Username yoki user_id va parol kiriting.", "error")
78
+ return redirect(url_for("web_login"))
79
+
80
+ if login in {str(ADMIN_ID), "admin"} and password == ADMIN_PASSWORD:
81
+ session.clear()
82
+ session.update({"user_id": ADMIN_ID, "role": "admin"})
83
+ return redirect(url_for("web_dashboard"))
84
+
85
+ db = get_db()
86
+ user = db.find_user_for_login(login)
87
+ if not user or not user.get("approved"):
88
+ flash("Foydalanuvchi topilmadi yoki admin tasdiqlamagan.", "error")
89
+ return redirect(url_for("web_login"))
90
+ password_hash = user.get("password_hash")
91
+ if not password_hash or not check_password_hash(password_hash, password):
92
+ flash("Parol noto'g'ri. Parol keyinroq bot orqali beriladi.", "error")
93
+ return redirect(url_for("web_login"))
94
+ session.clear()
95
+ session.update({"user_id": user["user_id"], "role": _role(user)})
96
+ return redirect(url_for("web_dashboard"))
97
+
98
+ @app.get("/logout")
99
+ def web_logout():
100
+ session.clear()
101
+ flash("Tizimdan chiqdingiz.", "success")
102
+ return redirect(url_for("web_login"))
103
+
104
+ @app.get("/dashboard")
105
+ def web_dashboard():
106
+ user, response = _login_required()
107
+ if response:
108
+ return response
109
+ db = get_db()
110
+ ctx = _base_context(user)
111
+ stats = db.get_order_stats()
112
+ inventory = db.get_inventory_by_warehouse(ctx["selected_warehouse"]) if ctx["selected_warehouse"] else []
113
+ if ctx["role"] == "admin":
114
+ orders = db.get_orders(limit=8)
115
+ elif ctx["role"] == "employee":
116
+ orders = db.get_orders(employee_view=True, limit=8)
117
+ else:
118
+ orders = db.get_orders(customer_id=user["user_id"], limit=8)
119
+ return render_template("dashboard.html", **ctx, stats=stats, orders=orders, inventory=inventory[:8])
120
+
121
+ @app.get("/products")
122
+ def web_products():
123
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin", "employee"])
124
+ if response:
125
+ return response
126
+ db = get_db()
127
+ ctx = _base_context(user)
128
+ warehouse = ctx["selected_warehouse"]
129
+ branches = db.get_all_branches(warehouse) if warehouse else []
130
+ product_types = []
131
+ products = []
132
+ if warehouse:
133
+ for branch in branches + [{"name": "common"}]:
134
+ for ptype in db.get_all_product_types(warehouse, branch["name"]):
135
+ product_types.append({**ptype, "branch": branch["name"]})
136
+ products.extend(db.get_products_by_type(warehouse, branch["name"], ptype["name"]))
137
+ return render_template("products.html", **ctx, branches=branches, product_types=product_types, products=products)
138
+
139
+ @app.post("/products/warehouse")
140
+ def web_add_warehouse():
141
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin"])
142
+ if response:
143
+ return response
144
+ name = request.form.get("name", "").strip()
145
+ if name and get_db().add_warehouse(name):
146
+ flash("Sklad qo'shildi.", "success")
147
+ else:
148
+ flash("Sklad nomi bo'sh yoki mavjud.", "error")
149
+ return redirect(url_for("web_products", warehouse=name))
150
+
151

154
+ if response:

+ return response
156
+ warehouse = request.form.get("warehouse")
157

158
+ if warehouse and name and get_db().add_branch(name, warehouse):
159
+ flash("Filial qo'shildi.", "success")
160

+ flash("Filial nomi bo'sh yoki mavjud.", "error")
162

+
164

165
+ def web_add_type():
166
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin"])
167
+ if response:
168
+ return response
169
+ warehouse = request.form.get("warehouse")
170
+ branch = request.form.get("branch") or "common"
171

179
+ def web_add_product():
180
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin"])
181
+ if response:
182
+ return response
183
+ db = get_db()
184
+ warehouse = request.form.get("warehouse")
185
+ branch = request.form.get("branch") or "common"
186
+ product_type = request.form.get("product_type")
187
+ name = request.form.get("name", "").strip()
188
+ code = request.form.get("code", "").strip()
189
+ unit = request.form.get("unit", "dona").strip() or "dona"
190
+ if warehouse and product_type and name and db.add_product(name, code, product_type, warehouse=warehouse, branch=branch, unit=unit):
191
+ flash("Mahsulot qo'shildi.", "success")
192
+ else:
193
+ flash("Mahsulot ma'lumotlari to'liq emas yoki mavjud.", "error")
194
+ return redirect(url_for("web_products", warehouse=warehouse))

+
196
+ @app.get("/orders")
197
+ def web_orders():
198
+ user, response = _login_required()
199
+ if response:
200
+ return response
201
+ db = get_db()
202
+ ctx = _base_context(user)
203
+ if ctx["role"] == "admin":
204
+ orders = db.get_orders()
205
+ elif ctx["role"] == "employee":
206
+ orders = db.get_orders(employee_view=True)
207
+ else:
208
+ orders = db.get_orders(customer_id=user["user_id"])
209
+ return render_template("orders.html", **ctx, orders=orders)
210
+
211
+ @app.post("/orders")
212
+ def web_create_order():
213
+ user, response = _login_required(["customer", "admin"])
214
+ if response:
215
+ return response
216
+ title = request.form.get("title", "").strip()
217
+ description = request.form.get("description", "").strip()
218
+ warehouse = request.form.get("warehouse") or None
219
+ branch = request.form.get("branch") or None
220
+ if not title or not description:
221
+ flash("Buyurtma nomi va izohini yozing.", "error")
222
+ else:
223
+ get_db().create_order(user["user_id"], _display_name(user), title, description, warehouse, branch)
224
+ flash("Buyurtma yuborildi. Admin tasdiqlasa xodimlarga ko'rinadi.", "success")
225
+ return redirect(url_for("web_orders"))
226
+
227
+ @app.post("/orders/<order_id>/status")
228
+ def web_update_order(order_id):
229
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin", "employee"])
230
+ if response:
231
+ return response
232
+ status = request.form.get("status")
233
+ allowed = {"admin": {"approved", "rejected", "done"}, "employee": {"in_progress", "done"}}
234
+ role = _role(user)
235
+ if status not in allowed[role]:
236
+ flash("Bu statusni qo'yish huquqi yo'q.", "error")
237
+ return redirect(url_for("web_orders"))
238
+ note = request.form.get("note") or f"Status: {status}"
239
+ assigned_to = user["user_id"] if role == "employee" and status == "in_progress" else None
240
+ get_db().update_order_status(order_id, status, _display_name(user), note=note, assigned_to=assigned_to)
241
+ flash("Buyurtma statusi yangilandi.", "success")
242
+ return redirect(url_for("web_orders"))
243
+
244
+ @app.get("/inventory")
245
+ def web_inventory():
246
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin", "employee"])
247
+ if response:
248
+ return response
249
+ db = get_db()
250
+ ctx = _base_context(user)
251
+ inventory = db.get_inventory_by_warehouse(ctx["selected_warehouse"]) if ctx["selected_warehouse"] else []
252

253
+
254

255
+ def web_reports():
256

257

264
+ def web_management():

266

273
+ @app.post("/management/users/<int:user_id>")
274
+ def web_update_user(user_id):
275
+ user, response = _login_required(["admin"])
276
+ if response:
277
+ return response
278
+ role = request.form.get("role")
279
+ password = request.form.get("password", "").strip()
280
+ approved = request.form.get("approved") == "on"
281
+ password_hash = generate_password_hash(password) if password else None
282
+ get_db().update_user_access(user_id, role=role, password_hash=password_hash, approved=approved)
283
+ flash("Foydalanuvchi yangilandi.", "success")
284
+ return redirect(url_for("web_management"))
